name: Vegetation Clearing
description: Removal of vegetation for ROW, laydown areas, access roads, and facility pads

name: Watercourse Alteration
description: Physical alteration of stream channels, banks, and riparian areas from crossings and diversions

name: Noise and Vibration
description: Equipment operation, blasting, pile driving, and traffic noise during construction

name: Habitat Fragmentation
description: Linear disturbance creating barriers and edge effects in contiguous habitat

name: Atmospheric Emissions
description: GHG, NOx, SO2, PM, and VOC emissions from equipment, processing, and fugitive sources

name: Spill and Contamination Risk
description: Potential release of hydrocarbons, chemicals, or process water to soil or water

name: Land Use Disruption
description: Restriction or alteration of land access, traditional harvesting, and recreational use

name: Erosion and Sedimentation
description: Soil disturbance leading to erosion, sediment transport, and deposition in waterways

name: Hydrological Regime Change
description: Changes to surface drainage patterns, groundwater flows, and water table levels

name: Waste Generation and Disposal
description: Production and management of solid, liquid, and hazardous waste streams

name: Traffic and Transportation
description: Increased heavy vehicle traffic on public roads and impacts to local transportation

name: Artificial Light
description: Night-time lighting from facilities and construction affecting wildlife behaviour and visual landscape
